meta.title: AutoLeadss — UAE Lead Generation Agency
meta.description: We build the whole system — landing pages, ads, chatbots, content. You get the leads. One fixed monthly fee.

hero.heading: We build the whole machine — landing pages, ads, chat, content. You get the leads.

problem.heading: Your ads aren't the problem — the system around them is.

slow.title: Leads go cold in hours
slow.description: The average response time for a UAE business inquiry is 4+ hours. By then, your lead has already spoken to a competitor.

scattered.title: Tools scattered everywhere
scattered.description: Ads running on Meta. Leads landing in email. WhatsApp messages piling up. No CRM. No follow-up system. No clarity.

noDestination.title: Ads with nowhere to go
noDestination.description: You're paying to send traffic to a homepage that explains your business instead of converting your visitor. Every click is a wasted dirham.

pillars.heading: Four systems. One monthly fee. Zero guesswork.
pillars.subheading: We don't hand you tools and walk away. We run the whole operation.

discovery.description: We audit your business, ICP, current funnel, and ad accounts. You get a clear picture of what's working and what isn't before we touch anything.

performanceExplainer.heading: How the performance fee works
points: We earn the fee only on sales or deals we can directly attribute to AutoLeadss — tracked through our landing page, ads, chatbot conversations, and UTM links.
Attribution windows: 30-day click / 7-day view for e-commerce. 90-day click for real estate (property cycles are longer).
You see every attributed transaction in your monthly dashboard before it's billed.
Performance fees are invoiced monthly, in arrears, after attribution is reconciled with you.
No retroactive claims — we don't charge for sales that happened before our work went live, or for organic word-of-mouth from your existing list.
Lower retainer = higher performance fee. Higher retainer = lower fee. We share the upside at the right scale.

uae.title: Built in the UAE, for the UAE
uae.description: Bilingual by default. Local market expertise. We know Bayut, Property Finder, and the platforms your buyers actually use.

ownership.title: You own everything we build
ownership.description: Your landing page, your content, your ad accounts, your audience data. Walk away any time and take it all with you.

aligned.title: We earn when you earn
aligned.description: Every plan includes a performance fee tied to attributed sales or closed deals. We have skin in the game.

noLockIn.title: No hidden lock-ins
noLockIn.description: Clear contract terms — 3, 6, or 12 months. No auto-renewal traps. No surprises in the fine print.

caseStudies.heading: What happens when the system runs right.
caseStudies.placeholder: Sample — real case study coming soon

items.a: Every tier covers landing page design and maintenance, chatbot setup and management, social media content and posting, ad campaign management, and monthly reporting. The breakdown per tier is listed in the pricing section above.

items.q: Do I own the landing page and content after the contract ends?
items.a: Yes. Everything we build is yours. Landing page code, content, ad creatives, audience data, ad accounts — all of it. You own it from day one, and you leave with it if you cancel.

items.q: Is the ad budget included in the monthly fee?
items.a: No. Ad spend is billed separately and goes directly to Meta, Google, or TikTok. We never touch your ad budget — you control it. We manage the campaigns; the spend is yours.

items.q: How is the performance fee calculated and billed?
items.a: We track every lead, sale, or deal that comes through our landing pages, ads, chatbot flows, and UTM links. At the end of each month, we send you a reconciliation report showing every attributed transaction. You review it, confirm it, and we invoice the performance fee. Nothing is billed you haven't already seen.

items.q: What counts as an 'attributed' sale or deal?
items.a: Any sale or inquiry that came through our tracked channels: UTM-tagged ad clicks, chatbot conversations, form submissions on our landing pages, or tracked WhatsApp threads. Walk-in customers, repeat buyers from your existing list, and organic word-of-mouth don't count.

items.q: What if I close a deal myself that didn't come through your channels?
items.a: You don't pay a performance fee on it. Simple as that. We only earn on what we drove.

items.q: For real estate — is the performance fee a % of the property price or my commission?
items.a: Your commission, not the property price. If you close a deal on an AED 2M property and earn a 2% commission (AED 40,000), our fee is a percentage of that AED 40,000 — not of the property value.

items.q: What if I want to cancel before my term is up?
items.a: Contracts are for 3, 6, or 12 months. Early termination means settling the remaining months at a reduced rate — detailed in the contract. We don't believe in holding clients hostage, but we do expect the agreed term to be honoured.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: Most clients see qualified lead volume increase within 30–45 days of launch. Setup takes 3–4 weeks. We don't promise overnight miracles, but we do promise a system that's built to work.

items.q: Can the website and ads be in Arabic?
items.a: Yes. Everything we build is bilingual (Arabic + English) by default. Full RTL support. Arabic ad copy written by native-fluent copywriters.

items.q: Do you handle WhatsApp Business API setup?
items.a: Yes. WhatsApp Business API setup, Meta verification, chatbot flow design, and ongoing management are all included depending on your tier.

items.q: What industries do you specialize in?
items.a: We specialize in UAE real estate (brokerages, developers, off-plan projects) and e-commerce (product retailers selling to UAE consumers). Both have dedicated landing page templates, chatbot flows, and ad strategies.

Monthly reports via a shared dashboard you can access any time. Growth and Premium tiers include bi-weekly or weekly check-in calls. You see exactly what's running, what it costs, and what it's producing.
